target_idiom: กรรมตามสนอง
source_meaning: time for repayment for past misdeeds
target_meaning: suffering incurred as a result of a previous evil deed; unpleasant impact which one incurs as a result of one's previous bad deed; evil retribution.

target_idiom: กลัวเหมือนหนูกลัวแมว
source_meaning: to be afraid of others, to avoid other people, to take care not to be noticed by others
target_meaning: to be cowardly.

target_idiom: กะโหลกกะลา
source_meaning: useless
target_meaning: useless; valueless; worthless.

target_idiom: กองทัพเดินด้วยท้อง
source_meaning: A disciplined, orderly army with high morale.
target_meaning: An army marches on its stomach.

target_idiom: กิ่งทองใบหยก
source_meaning: just right, most suitable
target_meaning: ideal combination; well-matched couple; perfect pair.

target_idiom: เกาะชายกระโปรง
source_meaning: to count on, to expect, to depend on
target_meaning: to depend on a woman for livelihood.

target_idiom: แก้วลืมคอน
source_meaning: The return of the prodigal son. The glory of returning to one's village wearing golden embroidery.
target_meaning: A person who forgets his home or family in a rural area after living in an urban area.

target_idiom: ขี่ม้าขาว
source_meaning: godsend, lifesaver
target_meaning: to be a heroic rescuer or saviour in a critical or difficult time.

target_idiom: ครูบาอาจารย์
source_meaning: student surpassing one's teacher
target_meaning: teacher.

target_idiom: คลุมโปง
source_meaning: to hide one's talents and conceal their existence
target_meaning: to hide under a blanket or cover (oneself) entirely with or as if with a blanket, as because of fear or chill.

target_idiom: คับที่อยู่ได้คับใจอยู่ยาก
source_meaning: It is better to be a big fish in a small pond than a small fish in a big pond.
target_meaning: it is hard to live in a place which makes you feel uncomfortable or unhappy, though it is a big or luxurious place; but a place which provides ease or happiness can be lived in, though it is a tight or small place.

target_idiom: งานเข้า
source_meaning: an extremely urgent matter
target_meaning: to meet an urgent problem.

target_idiom: จมปลัก
source_meaning: make no progress, remain unsettled
target_meaning: to remain (in a condition or place that is unpleasant or unlikely to lead to an improvement).

target_idiom: ใจคอ
source_meaning: one's mind; one's inner feelings; (a decision hinging on) how someone feels about it​
target_meaning: state of mind; frame of mind; disposition; emotion; feeling; attitude.

target_idiom: ใจพระ
source_meaning: generous, big-hearted
target_meaning: kind; kindhearted; benevolent; merciful.

target_idiom: ชักดาบ
source_meaning: to fail to make a timed preparation
target_meaning: to refuse or intentionally fail to make a payment when required to pay

target_idiom: เฒ่าหัวงู
source_meaning: indiscretions of an old man
target_meaning: dirty old man.

target_idiom: ซื้อเวลา
source_meaning: to kill time
target_meaning: to buy time.

target_idiom: ตักบาตร
source_meaning: punch a ticket, rip off a coupon
target_meaning: synonym of ใส่บาตร (sài-bàat)

target_idiom: ตำน้ำพริกละลายแม่น้ำ
source_meaning: vain attempt due to inadequate efforts; a drop in the bucket; a drop in the ocean
target_meaning: to waste resources or efforts for nothing or for an insignificant or unworthy purpose.

target_idiom: ติเรือทั้งโกลน
source_meaning: "cut-tailed dragonfly": (idiomatic) cut off and unfinished
target_meaning: to criticise something whilst it is still incomplete.

target_idiom: ตีปลาหน้าไซ
source_meaning: to spoil someone's start; to kill someone's enthusiasm; to take the wind out of someone's sails
target_meaning: to ruin an imminent or forthcoming success of another person.

target_idiom: ถ่านไฟเก่า
source_meaning: wildfire
target_meaning: old flame.

target_idiom: ทองไม่รู้ร้อน
source_meaning: indifferent; paying no attention; taking no notice
target_meaning: indifferent person; nonchalant person; person who cares not or pretends not to care.

target_idiom: ทำศพ
source_meaning: to look after someone's affairs after someone dies
target_meaning: to dispose of or deal with a corpse, especially through a proper funeral rite.

target_idiom: น้ำไหลไฟดับ
source_meaning: (idiomatic) night and day, completely different
target_meaning: a great deal; incessantly; nonstop.

target_idiom: บังเกิดเกล้า
source_meaning: natural law
target_meaning: biological; natural.

target_idiom: บั่นทอน
source_meaning: to hinder; to hamper; to throw cold water on; to put a damper on; to estrange (people)​
target_meaning: to discourage; to dispirit; to dishearten.

target_idiom: ปลดแอก
source_meaning: to cut loose, to go wild
target_meaning: to liberate, as from oppression, servitude, foreign control, social constraint, etc.

target_idiom: ปล่อยไก่
source_meaning: forget oneself
target_meaning: to make a fool of oneself.

target_idiom: ปากกาคมกว่าดาบ
source_meaning: double-edged sword
target_meaning: the pen is mightier than the sword.

source_idiom: 問うに落ちず語るに落ちる
target_idiom: ปากสว่าง
source_meaning: to keep a secret when asked about it, but let it slip inadvertently when chatting on another occasion
target_meaning: loose-lipped: given to indiscreet talk.

target_idiom: ปิดทองหลังพระ
source_meaning: good done to others is good done to oneself
target_meaning: to do good deeds without seeking attention or praise.

target_idiom: ปิดกล้อง
source_meaning: putting on the finishing touches
target_meaning: to wrap (to finish filming)

target_idiom: เป็นปี่เป็นขลุ่ย
source_meaning: to prize and maintain harmony
target_meaning: harmoniously, in united fashion

source_idiom: 立てば芍薬座れば牡丹歩く姿は百合の花
target_idiom: ผู้หญิงยิงเรือ
source_meaning: very beautiful, said of a woman
target_meaning: woman.

target_idiom: ฝากผีฝากไข้
source_meaning: to risk one's life
target_meaning: to entrust one's life to someone; to ask someone to take care of one until one's last breath.

target_idiom: เพื่อนตาย
source_meaning: a solid friendship of no regret even if one is to be beheaded for the other; friends sworn to death, eternal friendship
target_meaning: true friend.

target_idiom: ฟันธง
source_meaning: to make up one’s mind, to decide
target_meaning: to affirm, to confirm; to give a conclusive decision, to make a clear determination, to make a decisive ruling.

target_idiom: มดแดงแฝงพวงมะม่วง
source_meaning: (idiomatic) to be jealous (usually of a rival in love)
target_meaning: A man who secretly falls in love with a neighbouring, nearby or closely acquainted woman and tries to prevent any other man from getting close to her.

target_idiom: มีอันจะกิน
source_meaning: To be clothed in furs and ride in a carriage drawn by well fed horses. That is, the outfit in which rich people dress when they go out.
target_meaning: comfortably off; well-to-do.

target_idiom: เมืองนอกเมืองนา
source_meaning: a complete stranger
target_meaning: foreign country

target_idiom: รวมหัว
source_meaning: cooperating and working together to accomplish a task
target_meaning: to act or work together (usually for something bad).

target_idiom: ร้อยวันพันปี
source_meaning: whenever possible, at every opportunity, occasionally
target_meaning: once in a long time; once in a blue moon; very rarely; very seldom.

target_idiom: รับฟัง
source_meaning: to listen carefully
target_meaning: to take into account; to accept into consideration; to listen to and consider.

target_idiom: ลงขัน
source_meaning: to take part in
target_meaning: to share expenses in a certain activity; to join in financing a certain activity; to raise funds for a certain activity.

target_idiom: ล้วงคองูเห่า
source_meaning: test of courage; dare
target_meaning: to dare rob a powerful figure.

target_idiom: เล่นหูเล่นตา
source_meaning: to stare or glare in challenge; by extension, to pick a fight
target_meaning: to flirt with the eyes; to make eyes at.

source_idiom: 泥棒を捕らえて縄を綯う
target_idiom: วัวหายล้อมคอก
source_meaning: to make one's preparations after events have already begun: to put the cart before the horse, to start something in the eleventh hour
target_meaning: to close the stable door after the horse has bolted.

target_idiom: ว่าแต่เขาอิเหนาเป็นเอง
source_meaning: pot calling the kettle black
target_meaning: to criticise another for anything but do that thing oneself.

target_idiom: สมน้ำหน้า
source_meaning: reap what one sows, getting one's just deserts
target_meaning: used to express that someone deserves an unpleasant outcome: to have it coming; to serve someone right; etc.

target_idiom: สองต่อสอง
source_meaning: to do without being seen (by); to do behind (someone's) back; to do without the knowledge of (e.g. one's parents)
target_meaning: privately; in private; alone; without anyone else involved.

target_idiom: สะเทือนขวัญ
source_meaning: being horrified, trembling
target_meaning: shocking; appalling.

target_idiom: สำเนียงส่อภาษา กิริยาส่อสกุล
source_meaning: clothes don't make the man, anybody can look good if well dressed
target_meaning: manners maketh man.

target_idiom: สิ้นไร้ไม้ตอก
source_meaning: pinch pennies, live a stingy life
target_meaning: very impoverished; experiencing serious financial hardship; penniless; penurious; extremely poor; needy.

target_idiom: สิบปากว่าไม่เท่าตาเห็น
source_meaning: you understand better by seeing for yourself than hearing about it, seeing is believing
target_meaning: Seeing is believing.

target_idiom: สุกเอาเผากิน
source_meaning: cut corners
target_meaning: (to do something) sketchily just to have it finished; perfunctorily.

target_idiom: ใส่บาตร
source_meaning: bow, make a gesture of bending at the waist
target_meaning: to offer food (to a priest) by placing the food into his alms bowl

target_idiom: หน้าสิ่วหน้าขวาน
source_meaning: an extremely dangerous situation
target_meaning: critical; dangerous; risky.

target_idiom: หน้าอินทร์หน้าพรหม
source_meaning: have influence through one's reputation, have clout
target_meaning: authority figure; influential figure; powerful figure.

target_idiom: หนึ่งในตองอู
source_meaning: unique, matchless, unparalleled
target_meaning: exceptional person; the smartest person; the one of a kind; the one and only.

target_idiom: หน้าใหญ่ใจโต
source_meaning: to be too prominent, pretentious
target_meaning: extravagant or prodigal, especially in a showy manner.

target_idiom: หมาไม่แดก
source_meaning: disliking, make one sick
target_meaning: extremely undelicious; very unpleasant to the taste.

target_idiom: หมาหวงก้าง
source_meaning: sneak thief, literally "to steal like a dog"
target_meaning: dog in the manger; A person who prevents anyone else from having something which he is not entitled to or which he cannot use himself.

target_idiom: หาเสียง
source_meaning: to win, to gain a victory
target_meaning: to win voter support, as through electoral campaigns.

target_idiom: ใหญ่หลวง
source_meaning: (having) a great difference when compared with the same scale, one being far better than the other.
target_meaning: great (in size or effect).

target_idiom: ออกเรือน
source_meaning: The bethrothed are to tie the knot. The newlyweds' fingers are bound together by a red rope, symbolizing that their destinies are now bound forever.
target_meaning: to get married.

target_idiom: แหกขี้ตา
source_meaning: early to bed early to rise
target_meaning: to wake up or force oneself to wake up, especially when it is the time that one should sleep or it is so early or earlier than usual.
